Fixer that cleans up a tuple argument to isinstance after the tokens
in it were fixed.  This is mainly used to remove double occurrences of
tokens as a leftover of the long -> int / unicode -> str conversion.
eg.  isinstance(x, (int, long)) -> isinstance(x, (int, int))
       -> isinstance(x, int)
fixer_base)
tokenc
FixIsinstanceTz
    power<
        'isinstance'
        trailer< '(' arglist< any ',' atom< '('
            args=testlist_gexp< any+ >
        ')' > > ')' >
    >
    
}	|	j
rr|	j
q$q$|
args
setZ
children
	enumerate
typer
NAME
value
COMMA
next
append
parent
prefix
replaceZ
changed)
selfZ
nodeZ
resultsZ
names_insertedZ
testlistr
new_args
iterator
argZ
atom
4/usr/lib64/python3.9/lib2to3/fixes/fix_isinstance.py
	transform
FixIsinstance.transformN)
__name__
__module__
__qualname__Z
BM_compatibleZ
PATTERNZ	run_orderr

<module>
